## nsc version ensure

Ensures the current binary is at least a given version, updating if needed.

```
nsc version ensure [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --at_least string   Minimum required version (e.g. 0.0.481).
  -h, --help              help for ensure
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
      --build_info   Output all of build info.
```
